properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So here it is, my alabaster heart I’m keeping nothing back from who You are No hidden treasure veiled by key or lock You’re a lifetime worth of worship And that’s only just the start

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here it is, my every waking day The minutes, hours, the years of endless praise For You’re worthy far beyond all I could say There’s a lifetime worth of worship In the nuance of Your names

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let it rise like incense My whole life a fragrance Every ounce here broken at Your feet Every breath an offering My heart cries these lungs sing Over You, my worthy King of Kings

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There it is, Your alabaster cross Giving all You are for all I’m not I can’t believe that’s the kind of King You are Every breath an offering How could I not bring a lifetime worth of worship to You God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All my love You can have it all All my heart All my soul All I own Every breath an offering

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Every ounce here spilled out at Your feet Every breath is my offering Every breath an offering Every breath an offering Every breath an offering

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: All my love All my soul All I own
